company.name: Ramco Systems
company.tagline: Enterprise software for the cloud era — ERP, HCM & Payroll, Aviation, and Logistics.
company.description: Ramco Systems is a global enterprise software provider best known for its cloud-native ERP, Global Payroll & HCM, Aviation/Aerospace & Defense (M&E/MRO), and Logistics solutions. Ramco software is delivered on the Ramco platform with embedded AI/ML, and is used by enterprises across 150+ countries.
company.support_email: Refer to your Ramco account manager or the public contact form at ramco.com/contact
company.support_hours: Enterprise support per the signed service agreement (regional coverage; 24x7 available on eligible plans)
company.pricing_policy: Ramco does not publish list pricing. All pricing, licensing tiers, and discounts are provided by Ramco sales as a custom enterprise quote.
company.contract_policy: Refunds, cancellation, and renewal terms are governed by the customer's signed enterprise agreement (MSA/order form); there is no public, one-size-fits-all refund window.

products.name: Ramco ERP
products.tagline: Cloud-native, AI-powered ERP for mid-to-large enterprises.
products.description: Ramco ERP is an integrated, cloud-native enterprise resource planning suite covering finance, supply chain, manufacturing, procurement, sales, and project management. It uses a unified data model with embedded analytics and context-aware automation so business processes can span modules without custom integration.
products.target_audience: Mid-to-large enterprises in manufacturing, services, and distribution that want a single integrated ERP on the cloud.
products.pricing: Not published publicly. Ramco ERP is licensed via a custom enterprise quote based on modules, users, and deployment. Contact Ramco sales.
products.refund: Governed by the customer's signed enterprise agreement (MSA/order form). There is no public refund window — refer pricing/refund questions to the account manager.
products.cancellation: Per the contractual notice period in the signed order form.

products.name: Ramco HCM & Global Payroll
products.tagline: Unified HR and multi-country payroll across 100+ countries.
products.description: Ramco HCM is a unified Human Capital Management and Global Payroll platform covering core HR, time & attendance, talent management, and statutory-compliant payroll across 100+ countries from a single system. It is known for its multi-country payroll engine and chatbot-driven employee experience.
products.target_audience: Multinational employers and shared-service / payroll-outsourcing providers needing consolidated multi-country payroll and HR.
products.pricing: Not published publicly. Priced per employee/per country via a custom enterprise quote. Contact Ramco sales.
features: Core HR and employee master data
Global payroll across 100+ countries with local statutory compliance
products.refund: Governed by the signed enterprise agreement. No public refund window; direct billing/refund questions to the account manager.
products.cancellation: Per the contractual notice period in the signed order form.

products.name: Ramco Aviation (M&E / MRO)
products.tagline: Aviation, Aerospace & Defense maintenance and MRO software.
products.description: Ramco Aviation is a comprehensive Maintenance & Engineering (M&E) and Maintenance, Repair & Overhaul (MRO) suite for airlines, MROs, heli-operators, and defense fleets. It covers airworthiness, line and base maintenance, component overhaul, supply chain, and compliance, with mobility and AI-assisted maintenance.
products.target_audience: Airlines, independent MRO providers, helicopter operators, and aerospace & defense fleet operators.
products.pricing: Not published publicly. Licensed via a custom enterprise quote based on fleet size and modules. Contact Ramco sales.
products.refund: Governed by the signed enterprise agreement. No public refund window.
products.cancellation: Per the contractual notice period in the signed order form.

products.name: Ramco Logistics
products.tagline: Logistics & Transportation Management for 3PL and freight.
products.description: Ramco Logistics is a transportation and logistics management suite for third-party logistics (3PL), freight forwarding, and courier/express businesses. It covers order and contract management, billing, fleet and route optimization, and digital proof-of-delivery on a single platform.
products.target_audience: 3PL providers, freight forwarders, and courier/express/parcel companies.
products.pricing: Not published publicly. Licensed via a custom enterprise quote. Contact Ramco sales.
products.refund: Governed by the signed enterprise agreement. No public refund window.
products.cancellation: Per the contractual notice period in the signed order form.

products.name: Ramco EAM
products.tagline: Enterprise Asset Management for asset-intensive operations.
products.description: Ramco EAM (Enterprise Asset Management) helps asset-intensive organizations manage the full asset lifecycle: maintenance planning, work orders, spares inventory, and reliability — with mobility and predictive-maintenance insights. It is often deployed alongside Ramco ERP.
products.target_audience: Asset-intensive operators (utilities, infrastructure, equipment fleets, facilities).
products.pricing: Not published publicly. Licensed via a custom enterprise quote. Contact Ramco sales.
products.refund: Governed by the signed enterprise agreement. No public refund window.
products.cancellation: Per the contractual notice period in the signed order form.
